sentences.arabic: جَمَعَ تَامِرٌ أَصْدِقَاءَهُ لِلَّعِبِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tamir je skupio prijatelje da se igraju u parku.
sentences.translationEn: Tamir gathered his friends to play in the park.

sentences.arabic: قَسَّمُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ إِلَى فَرِيقَيْنِ وَلَعِبُوا كُرَةَ الْقَدَمِ.
sentences.translation: Podijelili su se u dva tima i igrali fudbal.
sentences.translationEn: They divided themselves into two teams and played football.

sentences.arabic: سَقَطَ وَاحِدٌ مِنْهُمْ وَتَأَلَّمَ رُكْبَتُهُ قَلِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Jedan od njih je pao i malo ga je boljelo koljeno.
sentences.translationEn: One of them fell and his knee hurt a little.

sentences.arabic: سَاعَدَهُ الأَصْدِقَاءُ وَعَادُوا لِلَّعِبِ بَعْدَ قَلِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelji su mu pomogli i nastavili igru malo poslije.
sentences.translationEn: His friends helped him and they resumed playing a little later.
